name: @open-cowork/standalone-gateway
description: Standalone Open Cowork Gateway execution appliance with private OpenCode and Postgres

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @open-cowork/shared build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-channel build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-telegram build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-webhook build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-testing build && tsc
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @open-cowork/shared build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-channel build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-telegram build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-webhook build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-testing build && tsc --noEmit
